mapper.select:
SELECT dept_id AS deptId, nd, COUNT(*) AS bs, SUM(QTJE) AS qtje, SUM(JFJE) AS jfje, SUM(CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(SFBJE) AS sfbje FROM cbjmx
AND nd = #{req.nd} AND dept_id = #{req.deptId} AND djxh = #{req.djxh} AND nsrmc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.nsrmc}, '%')
GROUP BY dept_id, nd

SELECT dept_id AS deptId, nd, jsbj, cbjthbj, fbbj, COUNT(*) AS bs, SUM(QTJE) AS qtje, SUM(JFJE) AS jfje, SUM(CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(SFBJE) AS sfbje FROM cbjmx
AND nd = #{req.nd} AND dept_id = #{req.deptId} AND djxh = #{req.djxh} AND nsrmc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.nsrmc}, '%')
GROUP BY dept_id, nd, jsbj, cbjthbj, fbbj
